title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Notaries Act, 1952. (2) It extends to the whole of India 1 * * *. (3) It shall come into force on such date2 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 25 of 1968, s. 2 and theSchedule (w.e.f. 15-8-1968). 2. 14th February, 1956: vide notification No. S.R.O. 317, dated 10th February, 1956, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, s. 3.
